notes: Three-Document Oversight Pass — Day-0 safety net that reconciles the loaded Master (racksByCab = installed), the BOM (IndexedDB bom_items linked to the active deployment = ordered), and the EDP optic ledger (= required) before sign-off. Engine: reconcile_run(force) builds count-only projections (Map by normalized MODEL / OPTIC TYPE) in a chunked pass that yields to the event loop (every 40 cabs / 1000 BOM items) so the main thread + memory stay safe on a 4,000-host Master; result cached in phantom_reconcile_v1 keyed by {deploymentId|masterHash|edpHash|bomRev} and recomputed only on source change or explicit RUN. Joins: aggregate count-reconcile (NOT per-serial — the three sources share no unit-level key): Optics 3-way (EDP required vs BOM ordered vs Master installed → SHORT / over-install), Hardware (BOM ordered vs Master installed → in-BOM-not-Master, short-install, phantom-asset). Exact normalized-model = high confidence; fuzzy substring match = REVIEW only (never auto-counted) per OODA ruling. UI: a '▣ DOCUMENT RECONCILE' panel mounts atop BUILD -> AUDITS (AUDIT.renderList) — kpi-row summary (Optics/Hardware/Review) + finding cards (badge-red/gold + REVIEW chip) + RUN button (skeleton-grid progress), all existing tokens, no new CSS. Pipe: one-tap '↳ LOG DISCREPANCY' writes a category:'reconcile' record to phantom_discrepancies_v1 + a DISCREPANCY_LOGGED audit event — which (via v1.6.83) rolls into the shift report. Graceful on partial sources (reconciles available pairs, never fabricates). Sign-off warning deferred per ruling. Built directly in Claude Code on top of v1.6.84 — sync web-Claude's sandbox before the next app handback. node --check clean; three stamps at v1.6.85.
